title: Optimise+
description: A Modpack designed to get the most juice out of your pc with the addition of not too many mods like other FPS modpacks out there
body:
## Optimise+

Optimise+ Is a Modpack designed to get the max FPS out of any scenario, also equipped with Iris shaders, your worlds will look stunning all the time, plus even on lower end pc's you can achieve framerates of 60+ using most shader packs! What makes this Modpack different from the all the other fps mods is that it uses smaller, more unknown optimisation mods alongside sodium and other larger mods to achieve the best framerates for any device.

### Optimise++ Available Now! More features, more Fun!

https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimise++
